title: DEKTON VDE 3Pcs Insulated Screwdriver Set – Tested to 1000V | En IEC 60900:2018 Certified | Chrome Vanadium Steel Blade | Magnetic Tips | Anti-Slip Ergonomic Handle | Professional Electrical Toolkit
features: Vde Certified Safety – Tested up to 1000V for complete protection when working on live electrical circuits. Designed to meet EN IEC 60900 standards, giving you safe, reliable performance for professional Electricians and Diy Users.

Ergonomic Anti-Slip Handles – Made from durable Pp & Tpr materials, the handle provides maximum grip, control, and comfort. Even during long usage, these handles reduce hand strain and ensure secure handling in all working conditions.

Durable Cr-V6150 Blades – Strong Chrome Vanadium steel blades provide toughness and long-lasting performance. The high-quality construction resists wear, bending, and damage, ensuring the screwdrivers stay reliable after repeated use.

Magnetic Tips For Precision – Each screwdriver features magnetic tips for easy screw pick-up and secure placement. This prevents slipping or dropping screws, making your work faster, smoother, and more accurate every time.

3Pc Set For Versatility – Includes 3 insulated screwdrivers suitable for various electrical applications. Compact and portable, this set is perfect for professionals, tradesmen, or home users who need safe, durable tools.
description: The DEKTON 3PCS VDE Insulated Screwdriver Set is built for safety, durability, and comfort, making it an essential kit for Electricians, tradesmen, and home users. Each screwdriver is VDE tested up to 1000V and complies with EN IEC 60900 standards, giving you confidence when working on live circuits. The ergonomic anti-slip handles, crafted from high-quality Pp & Tpr materials, provide a secure grip and reduce strain even during long hours of use. Designed with Cr-V6150 Chrome Vanadium steel blades, these screwdrivers deliver outstanding strength and durability, resisting wear and bending over time. Magnetic tips allow for easy pick-up and precise placement of screws, preventing slips and saving valuable time. This versatile 3-piece set is compact, reliable, and built to last, making it perfect for both professional use and everyday household electrical jobs.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Ideal for electrical maintenance, repairs, and installations on live circuits up to 1000V — perfect for electricians, tradesmen, and DIY users.
